title: This is why CI&T Inc (CINT) is not a Scam but one of the Best Cheap Penny Stocks to Buy
content:
CI&T Inc. (NYSE:CINT) is one of the best cheap penny stocks to buy that aren’t scams. On March 12, Canaccord Genuity reiterated CI&T Inc. (NYSE:CINT) is a Buy and raised the price target to $7 from $6. The price hike is in response to the company delivering impressive fourth quarter 2025 results that affirmed underlying growth.his is why CI&T Inc (CINT) is not a Scam but one of the Best Cheap Penny Stocks to Buy

Revenue in the quarter was up 19.3% year over year to $134 million and marked a fifth consecutive quarter of double-digit organic growth. Adjusted Profit was up 28.8% to $17 million as diluted earnings per share increased 44.6% to $0.11. The solid results come on the heels of the company capitalizing on growing demand for enterprise AI solutions. According to Cesar Gon, founder and CEO, clients are increasingly moving from AI experimentation to full-scale transformation. The momentum affirms the case for an impressive 2026 with organic growth expected at 14% year over year. The growth rate positions CI&T as one of the fastest-growing firms in the segment. CI&T Inc. (NYSE:CINT) is a global technology transformation specialist that provides end-to-end digital solutions, combining strategy, design, and software engineering to help large enterprises and fast-growth clients accelerate their digital transformation. While we acknowledge the potential of CINT as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. title: European Stocks That May Be Undervalued In April 2026
content:
As European markets experience a surge in optimism, driven by hopes for a shorter-lived Middle East conflict and positive movements across major indices like the STOXX Europe 600, investors are increasingly on the lookout for opportunities that may be undervalued. In such an environment, identifying stocks with strong fundamentals and potential resilience against geopolitical volatility can be crucial for those seeking to capitalize on market fluctuations.

Underneath we present a selection of stocks filtered out by our screen.

Next Geosolutions Europe

Overview: Next Geosolutions Europe SpA offers marine geoscience and offshore construction support services across Europe, Asia, and North America, with a market cap of €614.40 million.

Operations: The company's revenue primarily comes from its engineering services, generating €215.35 million.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 35.4%

Next Geosolutions Europe appears undervalued based on cash flows, trading at €12.8 compared to an estimated future cash flow value of €19.8, representing a significant discount. The company's earnings are forecast to grow 20.4% annually, outpacing the Italian market's 10.6%. Additionally, revenue growth is expected at 16.8% per year, surpassing the broader market's 5.5%. Recent affirmations of an annual dividend indicate financial stability and investor confidence in future performance.

According our earnings growth report, there's an indication that Next Geosolutions Europe might be ready to expand. Click to explore a detailed breakdown of our findings in Next Geosolutions Europe's balance sheet health report.BIT:NXT Discounted Cash Flow as at Apr 2026

YIT Oyj

Overview: YIT Oyj is a construction services company operating in Finland, Estonia, Lithuania, Latvia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland with a market cap of €645.81 million.

Operations: The company's revenue segments include Infrastructure at €517 million, Residential CEE at €306 million, Residential Finland at €317 million, and Building Construction at €649 million.

Story Continues

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 25.5%

YIT Oyj is trading at €2.8, significantly below its estimated future cash flow value of €3.76, highlighting potential undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite a forecasted annual earnings growth of 61.97%, YIT's low projected return on equity (7.9%) and insufficient coverage of interest payments by earnings present challenges. Recent agreements, including the construction of a data center for XTX Markets and other projects, bolster its order book but emphasize the need for improved financial management to leverage these opportunities effectively.

The growth report we've compiled suggests that YIT Oyj's future prospects could be on the up. Navigate through the intricacies of YIT Oyj with our comprehensive financial health report here.HLSE:YIT Discounted Cash Flow as at Apr 2026

Hexatronic Group

Overview: Hexatronic Group AB (publ) is involved in the development, manufacturing, marketing, and sale of fiber communication solutions across Sweden, the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, and internationally with a market cap of approximately SEK7.06 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segments include Fiber Solutions at SEK4.87 billion, Data Center at SEK1.41 billion, and Harsh Environment at SEK1.24 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 21.1%

Hexatronic Group, trading at SEK34.33, is significantly undervalued compared to its estimated future cash flow value of SEK43.52. Despite a challenging financial year with a net loss of SEK14 million for 2025 and lower sales figures, the company is expected to achieve profitability within three years and shows robust revenue growth projections of 5.9% annually—outpacing the Swedish market average. However, interest payments remain insufficiently covered by earnings, which could pose risks if not addressed.

Insights from our recent growth report point to a promising forecast for Hexatronic Group's business outlook. Click here to discover the nuances of Hexatronic Group with our detailed financial health report.OM:HTRO Discounted Cash Flow as at Apr 2026

title: CI&T Inc. (CINT) Full-Year 2025 Shows Significant Revenue and Profit Growth
content:
We recently compiled a list of the 12 Penny Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. CI&T Inc. is among the stocks with Insider buying.

TheFly reported on March 12 that UBS analyst Leonardo Olmos increased the price target for CI&T Inc. (NYSE:CINT) from $7.00 to $7.10 while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock.

Separately, on March 11, CINT published its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results under IFRS accounting standards. In Q4 2025, the company generated $134.3 million in revenue, a 19.3% increase from $112.5 million in Q4 2024, with 13.9% growth on a constant-currency basis. Net profit rose 38.6% to $14.6 million, while adjusted EBITDA reached $24.8 million, yielding an 18.4% margin.CI&T Inc. (CINT) Full-Year 2025 Shows Significant Revenue and Profit Growth

Adjusted profit climbed to $17.0 million, up 28.8%, and diluted EPS advanced 44.6% to $0.11, with adjusted EPS of $0.14, a 48% increase. CINT emphasized consistent double-digit organic growth, strong cash generation, and widespread adoption of AI solutions by clients moving from experimentation to full-scale transformation. The company plans to leverage this momentum in 2026, targeting approximately 14% organic revenue growth while continuing to turn technology investments into measurable business outcomes.

CI&T Inc. (NYSE:CINT) is a global technology and software services firm that delivers digital transformation, strategy, and AI‑driven solutions to enterprises, helping clients modernize applications, enhance customer experiences, and scale technology initiatives worldwide.

While we acknowledge the potential of CINT as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the best short-term AI stock.
